name: report_workflow_fsm:ENTITY_MODEL_VAR:ENTITY_VERSION_VAR:CHAT_ID_VAR
description: A finite state machine representing the report workflow with two sequential steps: mark as processed and create report.

transitions.name: mark_report_processed
transitions.description: Marks the report entity as processed by setting the workflow_processed flag.
transitions.end_state_description: Report entity has been marked as processed

externalized_processors.name: process_mark_as_processed
externalized_processors.description: Marks the report entity as processed

transitions.name: create_report
transitions.description: Creates the report by generating report details and adding a timestamp.
transitions.start_state_description: State after the report has been marked as processed
transitions.end_state_description: Report has been created and report details are available

externalized_processors.name: process_create_report
externalized_processors.description: Creates report details and sets report status
